purpose: Inspect and plan lifecycle operations for external dependencies known by Agent DevKit.
whenToUse: The user asks whether a required external dependency is installed or compatible.
The user wants to plan installation, configuration, upgrade, downgrade, or uninstall steps for a known dependency.
The agent needs to verify runtime prerequisites before using a module.
whenNotToUse: The user wants to run arbitrary shell commands.
The dependency is not registered as an Agent DevKit dependency provider.
